title: Colour Catcher Dylon Washing Machine Cleaner 1 Use, 5-in-1 Washing Machine Cleaner, Freshener and Limescale Remover for Cleaning Washing Machines, Single Application Pack
features: 5-in-1 action: The descaler works on 5 levels to hygenically clean your washing machine, ensuring fresh fragrance and removal of dirt and limescale.
Stop dirt: Over time washing machines start to become dirty. Dylon Washing Machine Cleaner helps to rid machines of dirt and limescale for more effective wash cycles.

Washing Machine Freshener: Build up of limescale and residue affects the freshness of your washing machine, Dylon's descaling solution ensures a fresh washing machine by removing any limescale or residue.
Protection: Using Dylon Washing Machine Cleaner both ensures your washing machine lasts longer, along with protecting your laundry.
Product details: Dylon Washing Machine Cleaner with 5 in 1 action. Single use application. Recommended use once every 3 months or after every 40 cycles.
description: Product Description Freshen and protect your washing machine with this powerful cleaner from Dylon! Over time, washing machines can become dirty and coated with limescale, causing bad odours and lack of freshness. Dylon Washing Machine Cleaner, with 5-in-1 action, works on 5 levels to combat this, renewing your machine's freshness, ridding it of limescale and detergent residue and creating an all round hygenic cleanliness and fresh scent! Use Dylon Washing Machine Cleaner once every 3 months or after every 40 washes for best results. How to Use: Step 1. Empty washing machine and add the contents of the sachet into your machine detergent drawer. Step 2. Select and run a main wash cycle. Best results at 60degrees C without pre wash. Step 3. For best results use once every 3 months or after 40 wash cycles. Product details: -5-in-1 action cleaner and descaler for washing machine. - Powerful dirt and limescale cleaner. - Combats odour. - Freshens whole machine. - Use every 3 months for best results. Ingredients Ingredients: Powder This product contains amongst other ingredients: Less than 5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Perfumes, Ingredients: Wipe This product contains amongst other ingredients: Less than 5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Perfumes, Preservation Agent (Benzalkonium Chloride) Safety Warning Precautions: suitable for front-loading automatic machines only. Only for use with stainless steel drums. Always refer to the appliance manufacturer's instructions. Keep out of the reach of children. Irritant risk of serious damage to eyes. Harmful to aquatic organisms, may cause long-term adverse effects in the aquatic environment. Keep out of the reach of children. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Wear eye/face protection. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately and show this container or label. Do not mix with other household products or hypochlorite bleach. Manufacturer Contact Information Spotless Punch Ltd., Knowles House, Cromwell Road, Redhill, RH1 1RT. See more
